testCoverage: 5 tests: 3 unit tests for NoOpObservabilityAdapter (standard, custom metadata, empty values), 2 integration tests for conditional bean injection (NoOp injected when disabled, Braintrust NOT injected when disabled). BraintrustObservabilityAdapter cannot be tested without real API key but is correctly excluded via @ConditionalOnProperty.
summary: Clean conditional injection pattern with @ConditionalOnProperty. NoOp adapter wraps traceAgentCall in try-catch to prevent observability failures from breaking pipeline. matchIfMissing=true ensures safe default behavior.
